reported_entities.name: Acer Inc.
reported_entities.claim: 宏碁 (Traditional Chinese: 宏碁股份有限公司) is the Taiwanese multinational hardware and electronics corporation officially known in English as Acer Inc., founded in 1976 as Multitech Electronics Inc. and renamed Acer in 1987.

notes: Single WebSearch query ('宏碁 Acer 官方英文名稱') sufficed to resolve the cross-language entity match with high confidence; result corroborated by Wikipedia, Wikidata, and Acer's own corporate site (acer.com) appearing in results. No WebFetch needed given consistent, unambiguous search snippet confirming both the Chinese official name (宏碁股份有限公司) and English official name (Acer Inc.).
